# Mohammed Rahil T (Rahil)

> Certified DevOps Engineer based in Kerala, India. Huawei Certified.
> AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD.

Mohammed Rahil T is a DevOps engineer available for freelance and full-time
roles. Based in Malappuram, Kerala. Specializes in cloud infrastructure,
container orchestration, and zero-downtime deployments.
